message:
Fix DataFrame arithmetic ops, type coercion, label width, and diff comparison

Four distinct improvements to fp-frame:

1. Series::to_string_repr label width: use display-consistent formatting
   (Int64::to_string / Utf8 raw length) instead of Debug formatting
   ({l:?}) which added spurious quotes around string labels.

2. Series diff: use semantic_eq instead of PartialEq (!=) so that
   NaN == NaN and -0.0 == 0.0 comparisons behave correctly.

3. DataFrame construction: add Int64-to-Float64 type promotion when a
   column contains mixed numeric types, ensuring homogeneous columns.

4. DataFrame binary arithmetic (apply_binop): compute the union of
   columns from both sides (not just left), filling missing columns
   with NaN. Also fix numeric string parsing to prefer Int64 over
   Float64 when the string parses as a valid integer.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
